channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: How about that?! Danielle Collins has a back-and-forth with a booing Australian Open crowd
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Danielle Collins got into a back-and-forth with a booing crowd at the Australian Open after eliminating a local player on Thursday night, blowing kisses to the spectators and repeating the phrase, “How about that?!” The 10th-seeded Collins, an American who was the runner-
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Tennis player Taylor Fritz is donating Australian Open prize money to LA wildfire relief funds
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — American tennis player Taylor Fritz said Thursday he is donating the prize money he earned for his first-round victory at the Australian Open — about $82,000 — to relief funds to help people affected by the wildfires in the greater Los Angeles area.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: March Madness will pay women's teams under a new structure approved by the NCAA
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Women's basketball teams finally will be paid for playing games in the NCAA Tournament each March just like the men have for years under a plan approved Wednesday at the NCAA convention.
item.dc:creator: TERESA M. WALKER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Curtis Jones scores 25 points in rare start to lead No. 2 Iowa St to 74-57 win over No. 9 Kansas
item.description: AMES, Iowa (AP) — Curtis Jones scored 25 points in his second start of the season to lead No. 2 Iowa State to a 74-57 win over No. 9 Kansas on Wednesday night, the Cyclones' 12th straight victory.
item.dc:creator: PAVLE MARKOVIC, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Iga Swiatek moves into a 3rd-round match against Emma Raducanu at the Australian Open
item.description: Iga Swiatek rushed through her first set in 26 minutes and completed her 6-0, 6-2 second-round win over Rebecca Sramkova in an hour at the Australian Open.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Pro Picks: Chiefs, Bills, Lions and Eagles will advance to the conference championships
item.description: The road to the NFL’s final four features seven of the eight division winners. Patrick Mahomes and the two-time defending Super Bowl champion Kansas City Chiefs open the divisional round weekend against C.J. Stroud and the Houston Texans on Saturday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Texas QB Quinn Ewers declares for NFL draft as program ushers in Arch Manning era
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Texas junior quarterback Quinn Ewers declared for the NFL draft on Wednesday, ending a Longhorns career in which he led the program to a Big 12 championship and twice to the College Football Playoff but was not always embraced by a fan base eagerly waiting for Arch Manning to ta
item.dc:creator: JIM VERTUNO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Urban Meyer joins Nick Saban in College Football HOF's Class of 2025; Vick, Strahan also elected
item.description: Urban Meyer will join Nick Saban in the 2025 College Football Hall of Fame class, and Michael Vick and Michael Strahan are among the former players who will be inducted.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Lakers' LeBron James recalls being 'unguardable' while competing against Michael Jordan as a teen
item.description: During a recent appearance on the Kelce brothers' "New Heights," LeBron James shared some details about a time when he went head-to-head with the six-time NBA champion.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Canadiens rookie Emil Heineman hit by car walking in Utah, expected to miss 3-4 weeks with injury
item.description: Montreal Canadiens rookie Emil Heineman was hit by a car in downtown Salt Lake City, Utah, where the left-winger suffered an injury that will force him to miss time.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Republican to propose resolution calling on NCAA to ban trans athletes from women's sports
item.description: Rep. Greg Steube, R-Fla. already has plans to introduce a resolution to further tackle the issue of trans athletes in women's sports after introducing a bill.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dakar Rally comes down to a duel in the sand between Lategan and Al-Rajhi
item.description: SHUBAYTAH, Saudi Arabia (AP) — Henk Lategan and Yazeed Al-Rajhi will duel in the Saudi sand for their first Dakar Rally title after swapping the lead for a second straight day Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Las Vegas Raider Charles Snowden thought he was in Florida during DUI arrest: Video
item.description: Tests showed Snowden’s blood-alcohol level was more than double the legal limit after officers found him asleep and unresponsive in a running SUV, documents show.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, NewsNation

item.title: Bears interview Mike Vrabel for head coaching position; Iowa State's Matt Campbell also comes up, report says
item.description: The Bears interviewed former Tennessee Titans head coach Mike Vrabel for their head coaching job on Wednesday, which was not unexpected. But a name from the college ranks that has now come up, according to a Chicago Tribune report, certainly wasn't on the radar of NFL coaching carousel pundits.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Rams could be calling Arizona home for Monday's playoff game
item.description: The National Football League announced a potential change to the Vikings-Rams playoff game scheduled for Monday night at SoFi Stadium in Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: Tony Kurzweil, KTLA 5
